title: NAAC Awareness Program
content: Event Date: 18th - 19th November 2024 The School of Computer Application & Technology (SCAT) at Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology organized a two-day NAAC Awareness Program on the 18th and 19th of November 2024 in Room No. C201. The program aimed to familiarize faculty and coordinators with the NAAC accreditation process, focusing on the Self-Study Report (SSR) Manual, the Distribution of Weightages across the 7 Criteria, and the 34 Key Indicators (KIs). The event began with an inaugural address by Dr. Vineeta Khemchandani (Dean, SCAT), Dr. Kavita, and Dr. Akhilesh Kumar Singh, who highlighted the importance of NAAC accreditation in institutional development. Overall Criteria Coordinators presented detailed sessions on their respective criteria, covering essential documentation, evaluation metrics, and implementation strategies. Interactive sessions provided a platform for faculty to resolve queries and share best practices. The program successfully equipped participants with the knowledge and tools needed to contribute to the institution’s quality assurance and accreditation efforts. The School of Computer Application & Technology (SCAT) at Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology successfully conducted a NAAC Awareness Program on the 18th and 19th of November 2024. The program aimed to enhance faculty awareness and understanding of the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) accreditation process and its critical role in institutional development. Objectives: The program focused on providing comprehensive insights into the Self-Study Report (SSR) Manual, the Distribution of Weightages across the 7 Criteria, and the 34 Key Indicators (KIs). It sought to prepare faculty and coordinators to meet NAAC’s quality standards effectively. Program Details: Each presentation provided insights into the documentation process, evaluation metrics, and actionable strategies for meeting the respective criteria effectively. Event Outcome The NAAC Awareness Program organized by the School of Computer Application & Technology proved to be an informative and impactful initiative. It prepared faculty and coordinators to address NAAC requirements effectively and fostered a culture of quality assurance within the institution. Under the guidance of Dr. Vineeta Khemchandani, Dr. Kavita, and Dr. Akhilesh Kumar Singh, the program marked a significant step toward achieving institutional excellence at GCET. Mentor Name – Prof. (Dr.) Vineeta Khemchandani Department Name – Department of Computer Applications and Technology
